title: Subitem converts with incorrect information
excerpt: When I convert an item to a subitem on a board, the subitem converts but all of the status column types convert with incorrect selections.  All of the columns are identical between the item and subitem and all of the cho…

posts.author: mcouger (Mechele Couger)
posts.cookedHtml: When I convert an item to a subitem on a board, the subitem converts but all of the status column types convert with incorrect selections. All of the columns are identical between the item and subitem and all of the choices are identical. If I refresh, some of the columns correct themselves, but it is inconsistent and some of them will still remain incorrect. In order to make sure the information is correct, I am having to document each column prior to conversion and then manually correct all of the status column types. We have six status column types and use subitems to manage portfolios, so this is extremely cumbersome on the team.
